Check planned N against MAS

Source: R/get_MAS.R
check_MAS.Rd

Checks whether a planned nitrogen dose (kg/ha) exceeds the Maximum Allowed Dose (MAS) for the crop. In ZVN, also consider the 170 kg N/ha/year limit from livestock effluents.

Usage

check_MAS(crop, N_planned, mas_table = NULL, edition = c("2026", "2025"))

Arguments

crop

Character. Crop name (DPI nomenclature).

N_planned

Numeric. Planned nitrogen dose (kg/ha).

mas_table

Optional. Same as in get_MAS. Default uses built-in table.

edition

Character. "2026" or "2025"; used only if mas_table is NULL.

Value

List with ok (TRUE if N_planned <= MAS or crop has no MAS_N), mas_N, N_planned, message.

On this page
